verdict_reasoning: HSPA5 (BiP/GRP78) is a canonical ER-lumenal chaperone. However, under cellular stress (viral infection, tumorigenesis, ER stress), HSPA5 translocates to the cell surface where it functions as a danger-associated molecular pattern (DAMP) recognized by immune receptors and targeted by therapeutic antibodies. Surface HSPA5 is also induced in cancer cells and is a documented target of CAR-T and antibody programs. The surface form arises via stress-induced trafficking and dual localization rather than constitutive PM residence.
